tasks.prompt: 'static.conf' yarat: server bloki ичида listen 80, server_name va root direktivalari bo'lsin.
'proxy.conf' yarat: location / ичида proxy_pass http://localhost:3000; bo'lsin.
'tls.conf' yarat: listen 443 ssl va ssl_certificate direktivalari bo'lsin.
'redirect.conf' yarat: HTTP (80) ni HTTPS ga yo'naltirsin (return 301).
'upstream.conf' yarat: upstream blokида orqa servis manzili bo'lsin (masalan 127.0.0.1:8080).
